## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Contract impact

<!-- Public interfaces, schemas, policies, events, manifests, compatibility. -->

## Security impact

<!-- Trust boundaries, permissions, data exposure, dependencies, threat changes. -->

## Provenance

<!-- Generated content, third-party sources, licenses, and authoring tools. -->

## Tests

<!-- Commands run and relevant results. -->

## Migration

<!-- Consumer impact and migration/deprecation plan, or "Not applicable" with reason. -->

## Rollback

<!-- Safe reversal procedure and data/compatibility considerations. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I used synthetic data and included no secrets, credentials, or production data.
- [ ] I documented contract impact and supplied an ADR and migration plan when required.
- [ ] I documented security impact and reported vulnerabilities privately.
- [ ] I verified provenance and applicable licenses.
- [ ] I ran the relevant tests and recorded the results.
- [ ] An authorized human will review and approve this change.
